ResearchProjectDef.label: quarrying
ResearchProjectDef.description: Learn to extract stone and minerals by digging a quarry pit.

ResearchProjectDef.label: advanced quarrying
ResearchProjectDef.description: Advanced excavation techniques for building grand quarries. Deeper digs into mineral-rich strata yield significantly better resources.

ResearchProjectDef.label: colossal quarrying
ResearchProjectDef.description: Monumental excavation techniques for building colossal, titan, and omega quarries. Mastering these operations guarantees unparalleled extraction of rare minerals.
